name: Chicken and Sausage Scarpariello
recipeIngredient: 1 small Bottle sliced hot chili peppers and juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Grill the sausage and chicken breasts on a barbecue grill or broil in the oven until they are slightly less than fully cooked.
2. In a large skillet, heat olive oil and sauté garlic, onions, green and red peppers, oregano, salt, and pepper until mostly cooked.
3. Cut the sausage and chicken into bite-size pieces.
4. Combine the meats with the peppers and onions.
5. Add the hot chili peppers and juice, stir, and continue to cook for 10-15 minutes or until the chicken is fork tender.
